user.title: Sensor Entities
user.description: Select the Home Assistant entities that provide your energy and temperature data.

data.gas_consumption_entity: Gas consumption sensor (cumulative m³ or kWh)
data.heatpump_electricity_entity: Heat pump electricity sensor (optional, cumulative kWh)

house_profile.title: House Profile
house_profile.description: Describe your house so the model can start with reasonable estimates. These values are refined automatically once enough sensor data is available (1-2 weeks).

parameters.title: Model Parameters
parameters.description: Configure the thermal model and optimization parameters.

data.heating_hot_water_fraction: Fraction of gas used for space heating (vs. hot water)
data.cop_coefficients_str: Heat pump COP coefficients (a,b where COP = a + b×T_outdoor)
data.outdoor_electric_loads_w: Outdoor electrical loads to subtract (EV chargers, etc.)
data.training_window_days: Use N days of history for training

devices.title: Heating Devices
devices.description: Add your heating devices ({device_count} added so far).

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Check the entity ID.
